title: More Culling Extra
description: A MoreCulling extension mod with smaller changes I don't want to put into MoreCulling. MoreCulling API example mod
body: # More Culling Extra A mod that adds small aditions to [MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling/) using its API. **Current Features:** - Glass Panes cull against glass & beacons - Glass culls against beacons - Beacons cull against glass --- ---
